queries.question: Show all events that had both dance recitals in room 101 and talent shows in room 101
queries.sql:
SELECT Events.Name 
FROM Performances JOIN Events ON Events.EventID = Performances.EventID
WHERE (Performances.PerformanceEvent = "Dance Recital" OR Performances.PerformanceEvent = "Talent Show") AND Performances.AuditionRoom = "Room 101"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?performances a :Performance .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?performances p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?events p:name ?name .
  ?performances p:PerformanceEvent ?performanceevent_w .
  ?performances p:PerformanceEvent ?performanceevent_w2 .
  ?performances p:AuditionRoom ?auditionroom_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?performanceevent_w) = "Dance Recital" || STR(?performanceevent_w2) = "Talent Show")) && STR(?auditionroom_w) = "Room 101"))
}

queries.question: What events have dance recitals and talent shows been held in room 101?
queries.sql:
SELECT Events.Name 
FROM Performances JOIN Events ON Events.EventID = Performances.EventID
WHERE Performances.PerformanceEvent = "Dance Recital" OR Performances.PerformanceEvent = "Talent Show" AND Performances.AuditionRoom = "Room 101"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?performances a :Performance .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?performances p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?events p:name ?name .
  ?performances p:PerformanceEvent ?performanceevent_w .
  ?performances p:PerformanceEvent ?performanceevent_w2 .
  ?performances p:AuditionRoom ?auditionroom_w .
  FILTER((STR(?performanceevent_w) = "Dance Recital" || (STR(?performanceevent_w2) = "Talent Show" && STR(?auditionroom_w) = "Room 101")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What events have dance recitals and talent shows been held in room 101?
